overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing the protagonist walking through an urban neighborhood at dusk. The character travels from a residential street lined with brownstones to a commercial corner with a bank and restaurant, eventually crossing a multi-lane street at a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with brownstones and fire escapes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential brownstones and trash bags

entered.detail: row of historic brownstone apartment buildings with stoops
metal fire escapes attached to brick building facades
tall brick public housing towers in the background
black garbage bags piled on the sidewalk
mature trees planted in sidewalk cutouts

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential city sidewalk flanked by historic brownstones on the left and buildings with fire escapes on the right. Tall apartment towers rise in the distance, and trash bags are scattered along the curb. The street is quiet with no visible pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurant and classical bank

events.description: transitioning from residential brownstones to commercial area with restaurant and bank building

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past a red brick restaurant and classical stone bank building

entered.detail: red brick building with green awning and restaurant signage
classical stone building with tall columns and domed roof
large advertising billboard structure visible above buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a commercial area as the character passes a restaurant with a green awning and a classical bank building with stone columns. The tall apartment towers shift to the left background as the character approaches a major intersection with a highway overpass visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with highway overpass and traffic

events.description: character stops at street corner to wait for passing traffic
police car drives past on the street in front of the character

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner waiting for traffic to clear before crossing

notable_agents.action: police car with flashing lights driving past on the street

entered.detail: elevated highway ramp structure crossing over the street ahead
white police sedan with LCPD markings driving past

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide street corner beneath an overcast sky, stopping to wait for traffic. A police car passes by on the right as vehicles move along the multi-lane road. The classical bank building now looms large on the left while a highway overpass spans the intersection ahead.

events.description: another pedestrian approaches and begins crossing the street alongside ego
ego begins crossing the street at the crosswalk with the other pedestrian

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk alongside another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket crossing the street while holding up a phone

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wide avenue with another pedestrian who appears from behind. They walk across the zebra-striped crossing together as cars pass on either side, heading toward the highway overpass that dominates the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet residential neighborhood that gradually opens into a bustling commercial intersection. It begins on a city sidewalk flanked by historic brownstones and fire escapes, moving past scattered trash bags toward distant apartment towers. As the character advances, the residential scenery shifts into a commercial zone, passing a restaurant with a green awning and a stone-columned bank building while a highway overpass emerges in the distance. The scene then expands at a wide street corner under an overcast sky, where the camera lingers as a police car and other vehicles stream past the looming bank. Finally, the character steps onto a zebra-striped crosswalk alongside another pedestrian, crossing the multi-lane avenue toward the dominating structure of the overpass.
